## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance, upcoming topics, and potential case study collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site performance continues to improve, with clicks up 16% and impressions up 12% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Upcoming content focus: foreign registration and nexus rules, followed by vertical-specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Discern agreed to participate in a GrowthX case study, with a 30-minute interview to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Minor technical issues to address: alt text on images and page load times](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

## Topics

### Site Performance Update

  - [Crossed 100k impressions milestone](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [55 click increase on the site overall](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [16% increase in clicks, 12% increase in impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Resources section driving 79% of total clicks and most impressions](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Homepage and career page showing increased traffic](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Content Strategy and Planning

  - [Current focus on LLC formations](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Next topics: foreign registration and nexus rules, then vertical-specific use cases (e.g., private equity, fund management)](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Mike emphasized the importance of foreign registration and nexus content](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Team to review first article on new topics for accuracy and additional context](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Discern's Marketing Initiatives

  - [Implementing Unify for automated email outbound based on website visitor data](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Targeting specific company profiles (size, compliance status, registered agent) for more effective outreach](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Hiring a data-focused marketing person to improve targeting and list building](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### GrowthX Case Study Request

  - [30-minute interview with Genevieve from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Low-lift process, questions to be shared in advance](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Mike agreed to participate, pending review of questions](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

### Technical Updates and Issues

  - [New Webflow login set up to prevent team members from being logged out](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Exploring API key for automated staging (not publishing) of content](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Potential alt text missing on feature images](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Increased page load times noted (2.5 seconds for some pages)](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Team to monitor load times, considering recent Webflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Megan to share case study questions and connect Mike with Genevieve for interview scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Jenn to check with Addy about alt text on feature images](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Team to monitor page load times and reassess next week](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Mike to share specific details about alt text and open graph tag issues in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Jenn to review first article on foreign registration and nexus rules with Mike when ready](https://fathom.video/share/P_R78au_F-6ETyEz3EQ_LcAnPTRhGjmT?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
